title: Adjustment
description: A professional adjustment applied to a comparable in the HVOS Adjustment Foundation. Deliberately non-rigid: factor, direction and confidence_level are plain strings here (no enum); the allowed categories/levels come from injectable configuration (engine.adjustments.config), not from this contract. amount_or_range is free-form so an engagement may state a single figure, a range, a percentage or a qualitative note. This contract carries no valuation math, no percentage limits, and forces no decision. manual_override records a professional-judgment change while preserving the prior value for later audit. additionalProperties is allowed so extra engagement-specific fields can travel with the adjustment.

adjustment_id.description: Stable identifier. Auto-generated on creation if not supplied.

comparable_id.description: Identifier of the comparable this adjustment applies to.

factor.description: What is being adjusted for (e.g. location, time, size, condition). Validated against injectable config, not a fixed enum here.

direction.description: Direction of the adjustment (e.g. upward, downward, neutral). Validated against injectable config, not a fixed enum here.

amount_or_range.description: The adjustment magnitude. Free-form: a number, a string range/percentage, or an object — no value math is performed here.

rationale.description: Why the adjustment is made. Required so the adjustment is explainable and auditable.

evidence_reference.description: Pointer to the supporting evidence (e.g. a comparable_id or evidence note). A reference only; no computation here.

confidence_level.description: Stated confidence label (e.g. High/Medium/Low). Validated against injectable config, not a fixed enum here.

manual_override.description: Professional-judgment override. Records the change, the actor, the rationale and a snapshot of the prior value(s) so the original state is preserved for the audit trail.

changes.description: Per-field {from, to} diff applied by the override.

previous.description: Snapshot of the pre-override values for the changed fields.
